description_long: This is a young child with a round face and fair skin, dressed in traditional-style clothing. The child wears a long-sleeved tunic with a floral border and loose-fitting pants, both garments featuring intricate patterns. The tunic is crossed at the front and has a high collar, while the pants are slightly cropped above the ankles. The child’s hair is styled in two symmetrical buns on either side of the head, with short bangs across the forehead. The feet are bare, and the hands are held out to the sides. The overall appearance suggests a cultural or festive context, with attention to detail in the clothing and hairstyle.
description: A young child in traditional attire with a long-sleeved tunic, loose pants, and hair styled in two buns, standing barefoot with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's facial features, crossed tunic, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the tunic, and the hair bun.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tunic, both hair buns, and the back of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the tunic, and the hair bun.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved traditional tunic with floral border and loose-fitting pants
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in two symmetrical buns with straight bangs
